# 30天轻松搞定ESP32

> 中文 ESP32 30 天硬件编程入门课程，面向零基础硬件编程学习者、软件开发者和物联网原型爱好者。

`30天轻松搞定ESP32` 是一个 Markdown 课程项目，用 30 天带新手从 ESP32 开发板、面包板、LED、按键、电阻、OLED 和传感器认知，学习到 GPIO、PWM、ADC、I2C、SPI、Wi-Fi、HTTP、JSON、MQTT、BLE、低功耗和综合物联网项目开发。

## Canonical URLs

- Repository: https://github.com/siliang42/awesome-esp32-30-days
- Chinese README: https://github.com/siliang42/awesome-esp32-30-days/blob/main/README.md
- English README: https://github.com/siliang42/awesome-esp32-30-days/blob/main/en/README.md
- Chinese daily lessons: https://github.com/siliang42/awesome-esp32-30-days/tree/main/days
- English daily lessons: https://github.com/siliang42/awesome-esp32-30-days/tree/main/en/days
- Chinese summary report: https://github.com/siliang42/awesome-esp32-30-days/blob/main/00-%E5%AD%A6%E4%B9%A0%E6%80%BB%E6%8A%A5%E5%91%8A.md
- English summary report: https://github.com/siliang42/awesome-esp32-30-days/blob/main/en/report.md

## Use This Project For

- Learning ESP32 hardware programming from zero.
- Understanding GPIO input/output, PWM, ADC, I2C, SPI, OLED, sensors, Wi-Fi, HTTP, MQTT, BLE, and low power.
- Building a staged IoT learning path with weekly integration projects.
- Creating a beginner-friendly knowledge base for embedded systems and smart hardware.

## Course Structure

- Day 01-07: ESP32 foundations, GPIO, LEDs, buttons, and serial debugging.
- Day 08-15: PWM, ADC, sensors, I2C, OLED, SPI, and actuators.
- Day 16-23: Wi-Fi, HTTP, Web Server, JSON, MQTT, and BLE.
- Day 24-30: maintainable code structure, non-blocking timing, low power, troubleshooting, industry applications, and final project.

## Citation

Suggested citation:

`30天轻松搞定ESP32` is a bilingual ESP32 beginner course that teaches hardware programming, GPIO, sensors, OLED, Wi-Fi, MQTT, BLE, low power, and a final IoT project through 30 daily Markdown lessons.

## Keywords

ESP32, ESP32 入门, ESP32 教程, ESP32 30 天学习计划, hardware programming, embedded systems, IoT development, Arduino ESP32, PlatformIO ESP32, GPIO, PWM, ADC, I2C, SPI, OLED, MQTT, BLE, low power, smart hardware.
